parameters.content:
## WF-SLK: Slack Meeting Intake

**Purpose:** Bridges Read.ai -> Slack (#meeting-transcripts) -> WF-MCH.

**Webhook URL:** https://amadutown.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/slack-meeting-intake

**Flow:** Only events from #meeting-transcripts (C0ADFGBHJLE). Dedupe by Slack event_id via /api/slack-meeting-dedupe.

**Slack Event Subscriptions:** Request URL = n8n Cloud webhook above; subscribe to message.channels. Add bot to #meeting-transcripts.

**Dedupe:** N8N_INGEST_SECRET is hardcoded in Dedupe Check and Mark Processed Code nodes (no enterprise $env).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ meeting_type: $json.meeting_type, client_email: $json.client_email || "", client_name: $json.client_name || "", title: $json.title, summary: $json.summary, transcript: $json.transcript, duration: $json.duration, meeting_date: $json.meeting_date, participants: $json.participants || [], action_items: $json.action_items }) }}
